# Otaru Events Calendar

https://otaru.spady.net/ is a privately operated multilingual calendar by Spady for public information about Otaru, Hokkaido, Japan.

Important pages:
- Japanese: https://otaru.spady.net/
- English: https://otaru.spady.net/en/
- Traditional Chinese: https://otaru.spady.net/zh-hant/
- Simplified Chinese: https://otaru.spady.net/zh-hans/
- Korean: https://otaru.spady.net/ko/
- Sitemap: https://otaru.spady.net/sitemap.xml

The site summarizes official public information and links to the original source for each event. It is not an official Otaru City or government website.
